creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
chromium-43.0.2357.134

When trying to save an image, as an example, no file dialog pops up.

I have tried clearing out ~/.config/chromium. 

When I try to save a file, I don't get any output from 

> work/stage/usr/local/share/chromium/chrome-wrapper --gdb

when trying to save the file.  Is there anything I can try to find what may be responsible?
